summary: Phase 3-5 regression pass: Swagger/OpenAPI, audit verify + JSON/CSV export, metrics 4320-min range, terminal recordings pagination shape, projects CRUD, plus frontend Activity verify/export buttons, search, pagination, and Terminal Records tab. All 8 backend tests pass; all frontend flows verified.
seed_data_creation: TEST_regression_proj project created and deleted within test; TEST_metrics_proj only created if no existing projects (not needed on this run).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite at /app/backend/tests/test_phase5_regression.py covers: /api/docs, /api/openapi.json, /api/audit/verify, /api/audit/export (json+csv shapes+headers), /api/projects/{id}/metrics?minutes=4320, /api/terminal/recordings pagination shape {items,total,limit,skip}, and projects list/create/read/delete. Frontend: Activity page testids audit-verify/audit-export-csv/audit-export-json/audit-search/audit-prev/audit-next all present and functional. Verify toast shows 'Audit log verified — Hash chain intact across N record(s)'. CSV/JSON downloads emit files audit-<timestamp>.csv/.json. Terminal /terminal with side-tab-recordings renders records list without crash under new {items,total,limit,skip} response shape.
